name: nitrocop wt-gph-rspec-rip-out runtime optimization (offense count fixed at 3992)

description: Baseline run on wt-gph-rspec-rip-out with offense-count guardrail (3992).

name: nitrocop default-output runtime optimization on wt-gph-rspec-rip-out (offense count fixed at 3992)

description: Baseline for exact user command (default formatter) with offense-count guardrail.
Raised default rayon cap from 8 to 12 threads when auto-configuring linter pool.

asi.hypothesis: Current 8-thread cap underutilizes 14-core machine on large, cold-cache workloads; raising cap should reduce wall time without affecting offense counts.
asi.observed: Runtime improved from 651.07ms baseline to 620.60ms with offense count unchanged.
asi.tradeoff: May slightly regress warm/cache-hit metadata-bound workloads on very high-core systems; still keeps a conservative cap.

description: Relaxed auto thread cap further to 16 (effectively no cap on 14-core hosts).

asi.hypothesis: Allowing full host parallelism may continue reducing wall-clock time on large cold-cache runs.
asi.observed: Further improvement from 620.60ms to 617.25ms with offense count fixed at 3992.
asi.next_action_hint: Probe larger/smaller caps or adaptive heuristics to balance cold vs warm-cache workloads.

description: Validation run after adding mandatory pre-benchmark build; observed much slower runtime than prior baseline.

asi.hypothesis: Previous kept gains may have been measured against stale binary; forcing build should ensure code-under-test is current.
asi.rollback_reason: Metric regressed versus prior baseline, and methodology shift invalidates direct comparison.
asi.next_action_hint: Re-initialize experiment with the updated harness and record a new baseline before judging code changes.

name: nitrocop default-output runtime optimization on wt-gph-rspec-rip-out (freshly built binary, offenses fixed 3992)

description: Fresh-baseline run with benchmark harness that rebuilds release binary before timing.

asi.hypothesis: Rebuild-before-run prevents stale-binary artifacts and gives trustworthy performance comparisons.
asi.observed: Baseline established at 702.43ms with offense_count fixed at 3992.
asi.next_action_hint: Test thread-pool heuristics and cop-filter hot-path optimizations against this new baseline.

name: nitrocop default-output runtime optimization on wt-gph-rspec-rip-out (conditional rebuild, offenses fixed 3992)

description: New baseline with conditional rebuild harness to avoid stale binaries and avoid unnecessary cache perturbation.

asi.hypothesis: Only rebuilding when source is newer than binary provides trustworthy code-under-test while reducing benchmark disturbance.
asi.next_action_hint: Focus on runtime hotspots: cop filter/config and AST walk.

description: Tried avoiding per-cop name lookup in hot loops by using redundant cop index and lazy name fetch.

asi.hypothesis: Reducing repeated cop-name string lookups in per-file loops would cut filter/config overhead.
asi.rollback_reason: Performance regressed significantly (698.51ms baseline -> 758.01ms steady-state). Extra Option/name branching likely outweighed saved lookups.
asi.next_action_hint: Revert and target heavier costs (glob matching/config resolution) instead of micro-branching.

name: nitrocop default-output runtime optimization on wt-gph-rspec-rip-out (fixed harness, offenses fixed 3992)

description: First run after harness fix; rebuild occurred and likely perturbed caches, so not used as baseline.

asi.hypothesis: Initial post-rebuild run can be noisier/slower; use subsequent no-build run for baseline.
asi.rollback_reason: Not representative for ongoing comparisons due one-time rebuild side effects.
asi.next_action_hint: Immediately rerun same benchmark without source changes to establish stable baseline.

description: Stable baseline after one-time rebuild; no-build run on exact user command.

asi.hypothesis: No-build run reflects steady execution for this binary and workload.
asi.next_action_hint: Pursue code-path optimizations in filter/config and AST walk while preserving semantics.

description: Precomputed path match context once per file and reused it for all pattern cop Include/Exclude checks.

asi.hypothesis: Repeated strip-prefix/path-relativization in is_cop_match dominates filter+config time; compute path forms once per file.
asi.observed: Steady-state runtime improved from 528.44ms baseline to 508.80ms with offense count unchanged at 3992.
asi.notes: First post-build run was much slower due rebuild/cold effects; second run used for comparison.

description: No-code rerun to gauge noise after path-context optimization.

asi.hypothesis: Measure variance to validate previous improvement is robust.
asi.rollback_reason: No code changes and runtime regressed on this sample due benchmark noise/system contention.
asi.next_action_hint: Consider median-of-N runs in harness to stabilize decisions before further micro-optimizations.
